top.title: To stay or risk the 'Road of Death' - Ukrainian civilians trapped in frontline city
top.summary: People in the Ukrainian city of Oleshky say they have been cut off from fresh supplies of food or medicine for months.

top.title: BBC traces how 10 minutes of Israeli bombing brought devastation to Lebanon
top.summary: The bombs started falling at 14:15 in the afternoon - bringing chaos and destruction across the country.

top.title: Bowen: Strait of Hormuz standoff raises risk of sliding back into all-out war
top.summary: The US and Iran's determination to keep the pressure on each other has put the fragile Gulf ceasefire in serious jeopardy.

top.title: 'I thought he was going to hit me,' OpenAI co-founder says of Musk

top.title: Apple to pay up to $95 to some US iPhone buyers over AI lawsuit
top.summary: Claims from last year said the tech firm’s advertising of Apple Intelligence fooled iPhone buyers.

top.title: US to safety test new AI models from Google, Microsoft, xAI
top.summary: New agreements between the companies and the Commerce department build on Biden-era pacts.
